TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cal_Bowdler, title = Cal_Bowdler, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cal_Bowdler} }

S.FORM: Cal Bowdler nalecuhan i Sharps, Virginia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Cal Bowdler i 1999 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 17, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 3 bulad 31 demiad, 1977 a mihca, Cal Bowdler, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾ bowdr~ɾər nar~ɾəʦuħan i sħarps, *irginia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ʦar~ɾ bowdr~ɾər i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu atr~ɾanta ħawks putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦar~ɾ bowdr~ɾər, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Cal Bowdler nalecuhan i Sharps, Virginia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Cal Bowdler i 1999 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 17, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 3 bulad 31 demiad, 1977 a mihca, Cal Bowdler, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾ bowdr~ɾər nar~ɾəʦuħan i sħarps, *irginia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ʦar~ɾ bowdr~ɾər i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu atr~ɾanta ħawks putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦar~ɾ bowdr~ɾər, miunduaj.
